text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of quiet anticipation—perhaps even mild apprehension—as if I am on the verge of entering a place where something important yet unknown might happen. The tilted perspective makes me question my balance in this space, both physically and existentially.

In the second scene, surrounded by vivid colors and the language of innovation, I feel mentally stimulated and curious. The display invites me to reflect on the evolving relationship between humans and technology—a dance of creativity, uncertainty, and possibility. I am both observer and participant in this unfolding narrative of progress.
